name: sync-theme
description: Browser extension that switches Gmail, Grafana, and Slack between light and dark to match your system theme.

scripts.icons: for s in 16 32 48 128; do magick -background none icons/icon.svg -resize ${s}x${s} icons/icon-${s}.png; done
scripts.check: node scripts/sync-manifest.mjs --check && find src scripts -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -exec node --check {} ';'
scripts.package: npm run manifest && rm -f sync-theme.zip sync-theme.xpi && zip -r sync-theme.zip manifest.json icons src -x '*.DS_Store' && cp sync-theme.zip sync-theme.xpi
